What entities are present and what are they doing in the outdoor school scene?
canonical_answer: A two-story brick school building features a white horizontal band with identification text. An American flag waves on a tall metal pole to the left of the structure. White snow covers the ground and tops the black metal fence in the foreground. A blue mosaic mural depicting children appears on the lower wall near the entrance.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a bald man in a purple suit and white shirt appears centered; at 4s, the man is seen wearing a dark jacket and checkered shirt without a tie; at 12s, partial text reading '15-YEA' appears on the screen; at 14s, the text updates to identify him as Jamal Mayers; at 16s, the title changes to Blackhawks Community Liaison.
